summary: Testing blocked due to critical backend performance issues. Most API endpoints timing out (>30s), preventing proper testing of book import system improvements including progress tracking, cancel functionality, and timeout protection.

critical_bugs.issue: Request timeouts after 30+ seconds, preventing user authentication
Request timeouts - cannot test progress tracking functionality
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot verify import progress details (total_sentences, processed_sentences, progress_percent, current_chapter, total_chapters)

critical_bugs.issue: Request timeouts - cannot test import cancellation
Request timeouts - cannot test import initiation
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot test new import features (60s timeout, retries, error handling)

performance_issues.issue: Severe response time degradation - most endpoints taking 30+ seconds or timing out
performance_issues.symptoms: User registration, import operations, and status checks all timing out

ui_bugs.issue: Form submission hangs with loading spinner due to backend timeouts

integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete registration/login flow due to backend timeouts
Cannot test import progress UI and cancel functionality without authentication

passed_tests: Frontend UI loads correctly with proper structure
Registration form has correct fields and validation
Available books list endpoint returns data (/api/books/available/list)
Alice in Wonderland shows as currently importing in available books
Import dialog structure appears correct in UI

success_percentage.frontend: 30% (UI structure correct, but functionality blocked by backend)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Investigate and fix backend performance issues - most endpoints timing out after 30+ seconds
Check backend server resources, database connections, and API response times
Verify translation service (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY) is working and not causing timeouts
Test import system locally to ensure 60s timeout protection, retries, and error handling work
Once backend performance is fixed, re-run testing to verify:
- Progress bars and cancel buttons work in frontend
- Import continues with placeholder text for failed translations
